# discover module constants
BEHAVIOR_THRESHOLD = 5
ERROR_THRESHOLD = 3
HOOK_CANDIDATE_THRESHOLD = 3
JACCARD_THRESHOLD = 0.15
MAX_RULE_LINES = 10
MAX_SKILL_LINES = 500
MISSED_SKILL_THRESHOLD = 2
REJECTION_THRESHOLD = 3

# discover public function / class signatures
add_merge_suppression(skill_a: str, skill_b: str) -> None
add_to_suppression_list(pattern: str) -> None
detect_behavior_patterns(threshold: int = 5, *, project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_constraint_decay(sessions_path: pathlib.Path, corrections_path: pathlib.Path, decay_threshold: float = 0.3) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_error_patterns(threshold: int = 3, *, project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_installed_artifacts(tool_usage_patterns: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_missed_skills(threshold: int = 2, *, project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_recommended_artifacts(tool_usage_patterns: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_rejection_patterns(threshold: int = 3) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_repeated_correction_patterns(corrections: List[Dict[str, Any]], threshold: int = 3) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
determine_scope(pattern: Dict[str, Any]) -> str
load_claude_reflect_data() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
load_jsonl(filepath: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
load_merge_suppression() -> set
load_suppression_list() -> set
main() -> None
run_discover(*, project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, tool_usage: bool = False) -> Dict[str, Any]
validate_rule_content(content: str) -> bool
validate_skill_content(content: str) -> bool
